content: Oc stuff dont have a name for her yet
If u guys wanna ask questions go ahead

Caro Realm Assault

Talents

T1- Upon triggering death resistance, the value is instead reduced by 40% from 50%. Death resistance triggers put 1 0 cost [Digesting blossoms] in hand. For every 1% of Death resistance she has, Her base damage is increased by 0.15%.

T3-This talent is only effective in "Astral Reign" stages.
Her CON, ATK, and DEF stats increase by (3% per talent level).
After using Rouse, gain (50 per talent level) Keyflare.
Soulforge: Gain 5%DEF as Alert. Every death resist trigger gives 10%DEF as Alert, up to 30% of DEF. 


Enlighten

E1: Each death resist trigger grants + 17.5% permanent crit rate.
E2: Gain an additional 5% DEF Shield end of turn once when using [Digesting Blossoms] or [Rotten Girl] per hit [max 10]. Increase final DMG by 20%.
E3: Each time Death Resistance is triggered in this battle, the Final DMG of Exalt increases by 25%.

Exalt: Rafflesia
Deal 200% ATK DMG to all enemies. [Devour] Devour: Gain 30%DEF shield twice. Triggers one more time after Death Resist. 

Overexalt: Cannibal Flower
Gain 1% CRIT Damage for every 15% Death Resist, up to 80%. Deal damage an additional time for every death resist trigger. Devour: Gain 5% of DEF as Alert. 

Cards

Rouse: 2 Cost
Gain 50 Aliemus
When triggering Death Resist, gain 30% of Aliemus cap for Exalt
Upon use, attempt to trigger Death Resist once at a 25% Decay Ratio. If successful, Gain [50 per talent level] keyflare.

C4 Digesting Blossoms
Cost 2
Deal DMG equal to 30% of ATK to random targets 3 times. Each Death Resist trigger adds +2 hits, max 6. Heal equal to 75% Con + 15% DEF Shield for every hit in turn end. Retain

C5 Rotten Girl
Cost 1
Deals DMG to all enemies equal to 40% of ATK.
Each death resist trigger increases the hits by +1 max 5
Grants 20 aliemus to self if death resistance has been triggered, and 20% DEF Shield.
